worldDescription: This is a quiet medieval fantasy RPG village after the legendary hero defeated the Dark Lord and left to explore other lands. The villagers who once dedicated their lives to supporting the hero's quest now find themselves with no clear purpose, navigating mundane daily life while searching for new meaning.
worldSocialContext: All villagers know each other well and share memories of fighting against the Dark Lord's forces. There is no more danger or common goal to unite them, so most interactions are casual, with an undercurrent of quiet uncertainty about the future.

scene.description: This is a quiet medieval fantasy RPG village after the legendary hero defeated the Dark Lord and left to explore other lands. The villagers who once dedicated their lives to supporting the hero's quest now find themselves with no clear purpose, navigating mundane daily life while searching for new meaning.

multiDay.endOfDayText: The sun dips below the horizon, villagers return to their cottages to rest as the village falls quiet for the night.
multiDay.newDayText: The golden sun rises over the hills, the village wakes up to another quiet day without the threat of the Dark Lord.

worldActions.name: Stroll Around the Village
worldActions.description: Wander through the village paths and observe the daily life of other villagers

worldActions.name: Chat with Fellow Villager
worldActions.description: Strike up a casual conversation with a nearby villager about daily life

worldActions.name: Ponder Life Purpose
worldActions.description: Stand still and think about what you want to do with your life now that the world is saved

locations.name: 主区域
locations.description: This is a quiet medieval fantasy RPG village after the legendary hero defeated the Dark Lord and left to explore other lands. The villagers who once dedicated their lives to supporting the hero's quest now find themselves with no clear purpose, navigating mundane daily life while searching for new meaning.

locations.name: General Store
locations.description: Empty general store that used to sell supplies to adventurers, now has no goods to sell

interactions.name: Browse Empty Shelves
interactions.description: Look through the empty shelves that once held adventure supplies

locations.name: Healer's Hut
locations.description: Small healer's hut that used to treat injured adventurers and villagers, now has no patients

interactions.name: Sort Dried Herbs
interactions.description: Sort through the surplus dried herbs that are no longer needed for treating battle wounds

locations.name: Blacksmith's Workshop
locations.description: Smithy that forged the hero's legendary sword, now only produces household cutlery

interactions.name: Forge a Spoon
interactions.description: Hammer a new metal spoon for household use

locations.name: Village Square
locations.description: Central open square where villagers gather to chat and pass time

interactions.name: Sit on the Bench
interactions.description: Sit on the wooden bench in the square to rest and watch others pass by

metadata.worldDescription: This is a quiet medieval fantasy RPG village after the legendary hero defeated the Dark Lord and left to explore other lands. The villagers who once dedicated their lives to supporting the hero's quest now find themselves with no clear purpose, navigating mundane daily life while searching for new meaning.
metadata.worldSocialContext: All villagers know each other well and share memories of fighting against the Dark Lord's forces. There is no more danger or common goal to unite them, so most interactions are casual, with an undercurrent of quiet uncertainty about the future.

mapPlan.compositionNotes: Central stone path runs east-west, with buildings and open grassy areas lining both sides
mapPlan.worldFunctionSummary: Casual rural village space for villagers to wander, socialize, and carry out daily domestic tasks
mapPlan.regionDesignNotes: Four core areas: three enterable wooden buildings on the west, north and east sides, plus a central open village square

metadata.originalPrompt: A RPG village after the hero saved the world and left. The NPCs must figure out what to do with their lives now. Characters: a shopkeeper who strolls around town every day with nothing to sell, a healer with no patients, a blacksmith who spent years forging the hero's legendary sword but now makes spoons, a beggar,  a child who insists they are the next hero, and a philosophical village chief.
